title: Charity inquiry: Education for Gondar, and formerly registered charities Education in Sidama, Education for Nyanza and Education in Western Province
body: "A statement of the results of an inquiry into:   Education for Gondar (1178949) Education in Sidama (1193709 – now removed) Education for Nyanza (1195069 – now removed) Education in Western Province, Kenya (1194872 – now removed).  "
